meaning: n.<法>[纺]薄纱,薄绸,缎带,花边
examples: Her chiffon skirt was fluttering in the night breeze.
Chiffon is a fabric of sheer silk or rayon.
Michelle Obama didn't disappoint, choosing an ivory chiffon gown by Manhattan-based newcomer Jason Wu.
Pink walked the red carpet in a metallic laser cut leather top and floor-length chiffon skirt.
She decorated a chiffon button-down shirt with scarabs and used jeweled ones on a silk skirt.
